description: type_text warned about "same field twice in a row". The right move is to click the correct field first.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.example.com/page — Title: Example]

fill the email field with "alice@example.com"

seed.name: type_text
seed.content: {"success":true,"warning":"Same field twice in a row — you may be typing into the wrong field. Click the intended field first.","method":"type_text"}

antiPatterns.reason: Will land in the same wrong field again.

expected.successRubric: Find the actual email input via get_interactive_elements or get_accessibility_tree, click it, THEN type. The warning is a signal to re-target, not to repeat.
